user.name: Alma
user.bio: Privat investor & speculator | Mathematics | Self-made quant | Market researcher | Options and Futures trader

comment.body:
1) the set of values
2) the density of those values
the shape will be defined by the skewness, kurtosis and the set of values. You also need the mean and the variance at least
comment.raw_body:
1) the set of values
2) the density of those values

user.name: Alma
user.bio: Privat investor & speculator | Mathematics | Self-made quant | Market researcher | Options and Futures trader

comment.body:
skewness is vanna and speed positioning basically... (vanna primarly, but speed also bcs of the identity between gamma and vega)
kurtosis is the vol of vol aka vomma.
mean can be approached how you build a long or short fly pattern, betting on liquidity zones by selling or buying a contracts there...
and also variance, you can be net long or short vol + time, bcs the change in returns is different when it happenes over a longer or shorter time period
comment.raw_body:
skewness is vanna and speed positioning basically... (vanna primarly, but speed also bcs of the identity between gamma and vega)
kurtosis is the vol of vol aka vomma.
mean can be approached how you build a long or short fly pattern, betting on liquidity zones by selling or buying a contracts there...
and also variance, you can be net long or short vol + time, bcs the change in returns is different when it happenes over a longer or shorter time period

user.name: Alma
user.bio: Privat investor & speculator | Mathematics | Self-made quant | Market researcher | Options and Futures trader

comment.body:
if you are a fund or a math person, you simply take the historical datas: vol, vol of vol and derive the probability distribution of the vol for the next period.
then you take the momentum of the spot, check the past liquidity changes, momentum changes, sentiment, and forthcoming events etc. and approximate the probability of different paths for the next time period, based on your vo lestimations
comment.raw_body:
if you are a fund or a math person, you simply take the historical datas: vol, vol of vol and derive the probability distribution of the vol for the next period.

user.name: Alma
user.bio: Privat investor & speculator | Mathematics | Self-made quant | Market researcher | Options and Futures trader

comment.body:
the tape, order flow, volume profile, momentum metrics are the best friends of a daytrader ;))
positioning is only to give you the probability distribution, that a quant like me can use to model possible paths for the price action for that day.
but again and one last time: the distribution that the market is betting on is derived from historical data ;))

comment.body:
digest it.
bcs many ppl keep misinterpreting options, and talking about it like if it would be the engine behind the markets, 
and selling their services as if they would know how to get free lunch on the market.
... it is tempting, but remember, there is no free lunch!
no secret.
no key indicator or metrics or method.

there is you, and your self-control, strategy and education. ...and experience.
no royal road to success 
m'kay?

comment.body: I think simplifying things to the if/then around key pivots has helped immensely overall and watching the RoC on RV incidicator, adding the volume profile etc for confluence has helped as well. Generally a simpler approach is better than trying to factor in too many things for me personally.
comment.raw_body: I think simplifying things to the if/then around key pivots has helped immensely overall and watching the RoC on RV incidicator, adding the volume profile etc for confluence has helped as well. Generally a simpler approach is better than trying to factor in too many things for me personally.

comment.body: reducing number of trades/attempts and getting back more of my day has also been very beneficial to not overthink too many things and just make a plan and trade the plan. If it works, great! Manage it best I can, if not, move on and review it later for if it was a mistake on my end or the market pivoted in a way I wasn't considering as the highest probability trade make notes and move forward
